goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 17:45' and should depart from 'stansted airport'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get 'price'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'cherry hinton hall and grounds'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 17:45 and should depart from stansted airport
The train should go to cambridge and should leave on saturday
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called cherry hinton hall and grounds
Make sure you get entrance fee and postcode
